failureModes: spectator state is not direct mouse input
detectors.interpretation: Highlights a rapid acquisition with abrupt acceleration and low post-movement target error; it does not infer input method.
detectors.title: Server-observed aim dynamics

failureModes: weapon upgrades or mode changes absent from state
detectors.interpretation: Reports a cycle-time violation only when weapon and ammo state are authoritative.
detectors.title: Authoritative fire cadence invariant

detectors.interpretation: Surfaces close alignment only after the recorded information channels have been explicitly ruled out.
detectors.title: Audited hidden-target alignment

detectors.interpretation: Reports speed beyond the authoritative state-specific bound; it is an engine-data consistency check.
detectors.title: Authoritative movement invariant
